name: Thanos
description: Global, highly-available query layer over the kube-prometheus-stack Prometheus. Enables the Thanos sidecar on Prometheus and deploys Thanos Query, registered as a Grafana datasource. (Re-install if kube-prometheus-stack is later upgraded, which resets the sidecar.)

setup_commands.command: kubectl -n monitoring patch prometheus kube-prometheus-stack-prometheus --type merge -p '{"spec":{"thanos":{"image":"quay.io/thanos/thanos:v${VERSION}"}}}' && kubectl -n monitoring rollout status statefulset/prometheus-kube-prometheus-stack-prometheus --timeout=300s
setup_commands.label: Enabling Thanos sidecar on Prometheus

setup_commands.command:
kubectl apply -f - <<'EOF'
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: thanos
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: thanos-sidecar-grpc
  namespace: monitoring
spec:
  clusterIP: None
  publishNotReadyAddresses: true
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: prometheus
    operator.prometheus.io/name: kube-prometheus-stack-prometheus
  ports:
    - name: grpc
      port: 10901
      targetPort: 10901
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: thanos-query
  namespace: thanos
  labels:
    app: thanos-query
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: thanos-query
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: thanos-query
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: thanos-query
          image: quay.io/thanos/thanos:v${VERSION}
          args:
            - query
            - --http-address=0.0.0.0:9090
            - --grpc-address=0.0.0.0:10901
            - --query.replica-label=prometheus_replica
            - --endpoint=dnssrv+_grpc._tcp.thanos-sidecar-grpc.monitoring.svc.cluster.local
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 9090
            - name: grpc
              containerPort: 10901
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /-/ready
              port: 9090
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: thanos-query
  namespace: thanos
spec:
  selector:
    app: thanos-query
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 9090
      targetPort: 9090
EOF
setup_commands.label: Deploying Thanos Query
Waiting for Thanos Query to become ready

setup_commands.command:
kubectl apply -f - <<'EOF'
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: thanos-grafana-datasource
  namespace: monitoring
  labels:
    grafana_datasource: "1"
data:
  thanos-datasource.yaml: |
    apiVersion: 1
    datasources:
    - name: Thanos
      type: prometheus
      access: proxy
      url: http://thanos-query.thanos.svc.cluster.local:9090
      isDefault: false
EOF
setup_commands.label: Registering Thanos datasource in Grafana

teardown_commands.command: kubectl -n monitoring patch prometheus kube-prometheus-stack-prometheus --type merge -p '{"spec":{"thanos":null}}' 2>/dev/null || true
teardown_commands.label: Disabling Thanos sidecar
